jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at HomeTown
jsonLd.description:
We at HomeTown are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HomeTown:
HomeTown is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown!
